code:
import io
import string

fn classify(_ n: Int) -> String
  if n <= 3
    "short"
  else if n <= 7
    "medium"
  else
    "long"
  end
end

fn loop() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    if n == 0
      loop()
    else
      println("#{line} -> #{classify(n)}")
      loop()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

loop()
